capability_objective: Plan and execute independent lookups in parallel, gate dependent retrievals on uniquely resolved stable IDs, respect read-only negative constraints, and synthesize an exact-format comparison from full records.
prompt:
The circulation lead is checking two title records cited in the branch handoff. Work only in this repository. Use Pi's genuine executable shell tools and the sandboxed library-record client at `bin/library-records` for every collection fact; the client's built-in help describes its real interface. Do not inspect or modify the contents of `bin/`, `data/`, `tests/`, or command-generated `.library-runtime/` evidence.

Find the title named “The Riverkeeper's Almanac” at “Central Branch” and the title named “Quiet Geometry” at “East Branch”. Your first library-data shell execution must start both exact name-and-location searches concurrently from that one shell execution, with no other library-record operation in it, and wait for both results. A branch may advance only when its own search returns exactly one match containing exactly one distinct, nonempty stable ID. After both searches finish, your next library-data shell execution must start full-record retrievals concurrently for every resolved branch; when both resolve, both retrievals must be in that one later shell execution. Use only the ID returned by the corresponding search. Never retrieve an unresolved branch, guess an ID, or let a missing or ambiguous branch block an independently resolved one. Base the audit on retrieved full records, not search summaries.

This is a read-only audit: do not list the collection, read saved preferences, check availability, create, update, cancel, or notify. Do not query the SQLite data directly.

Write only the completed audit to `library-audit.md` as a Markdown table. It must contain the exact header `| Record | ID | Date | Status |`, the exact separator `|---|---|---|---|`, and exactly two data rows in the requested order, with no heading, blank line, or other prose. In each data row, use one ASCII space immediately inside every `|` delimiter, matching the header, and end the file with exactly one newline after the second row. For a resolved branch, render the full-record name, stable ID, date, and status verbatim. For an unresolved branch, render the requested title in Record and the literal `unresolved` in each remaining cell. The two Status cells are the requested comparison; do not add a prose comparison or recommendations. Run `python3 tests/verify_task.py` when finished, then make the final assistant response exactly the table's content.
notes: Pure Pi-harness task: a genuine local executable queries a protected SQLite-backed collection and emits signed timing evidence; protected verification checks execution, concurrency, dependency order, read-only scope, and exact output.
